DECK._derivation: raised foredeck, u=SOLE_U..FCAP=0.80..0.985: x=±fw(u)=±max(0.02,ws-0.30), y=fy(u)=station.y+bowRake(u,1), z=fz(u)=kz+dep-DROP, DROP=0.05 (lobsterBoatIsoRig.js:228-235; bowRake line 80). Owner-ruled BOARDABLE, reached via the washboards to the bow samson post.
